svg.title: Whitebox Component Diagram: Checkout Orchestrator
svg.desc: Buyer App -> Order Entry; Payment Gateway -> Payment Status; Fulfillment Dispatch -> Fulfillment Platform; Operations Console -> Support Console; Order Entry -> Request Router.Inbound Orders; Support Console -> Order Writer.Audit Need; Request Router.Inbound Orders -> Order Writer.Persistence API; Request Router.Quote Request required Pricing Quote -> Pricing Adapter.Quote API provided Pricing Quote; Request Router.Reserve Request required Inventory Reservation -> Inventory Adapter.Reserve API provided Inventory Reservation; Request Router.Payment Request required Payment Authorization -> Payment Adapter.Authorization API provided Payment Authorization; Request Router.Fraud Request required Fraud Screening -> Fraud Policy.Screening API provided Fraud Screening; Order Writer.Audit Need required Audit Event -> Audit Logger.Audit API provided Audit Event; Request Router.Notify Request required Notification Dispatch -> Notifier.Notification API provided Notification Dispatch
svg.metadata: Diagram Complexity Signal raw metrics: ports=18; component_ports=4; part_ports=14; parts=8; externals=4; interfaces=9; interface_roles=18; connectors=13; warnings=ports>=10,interface_roles>=8,connectors>=10,parts>=6
svg.text: Request Router.Inbound Orders -> Order Writer.Persistence API
Request Router.Quote Request required Pricing Quote -> Pricing Adapter.Quote API provided Pricing Quote
Request Router.Reserve Request required Inventory Reservation -> Inventory Adapter.Reserve API provided Inventory Reservation
Request Router.Payment Request required Payment Authorization -> Payment Adapter.Authorization API provided Payment Authorization
Request Router.Fraud Request required Fraud Screening -> Fraud Policy.Screening API provided Fraud Screening
Order Writer.Audit Need required Audit Event -> Audit Logger.Audit API provided Audit Event
Request Router.Notify Request required Notification Dispatch -> Notifier.Notification API provided Notification Dispatch
